records.root_cause: connection-pool exhaustion after the 06-20 checkout deploy (human-curated: accepted)
records.resolution: rolled back deploy 2026-06-20; pool max raised in follow-up PR

diary:
## 2026-06-20 — checkout p99 latency (ALERT-777)

**What happened**: p99 latency on checkout rose above 4s after the morning deploy.

**Root cause (proposal, human-accepted)**: connection-pool exhaustion.

**Resolution**: rollback, pool max raised.

**Action items**: alert on pool saturation.
